verbatim_text: Yes. Yes. Yes. I guess it doesn't happen or do you need to do it? Yeah. So that's a good question. So in the full paper we had these like experiments where we tried to localize where every fact lived inside the network and then we only tried to patch ones that were like independent basically. But yeah that's a good question. Yeah. How do you find rich neurons to patch? You don't exhaust the storage? So we have probes. So when we train the probes they like get one proposition at a time. And so like we use those probes.
